input.background: What is the probability of being born on specific dates in February?
input.question: What is the probability of being born on February 28?

output.method: 事件发生概率及独立性
output.answer: Feb 28 occurs 4 times every 4 years. Three of the years have 365 days, and every fourth year (leap year) has 366 days. Therefore, Pr(Feb 28) = 4 / (365 + 365 + 365 + 366) = 0.0027378.

specific_date.description: The specific date in February for which the probability of being born is being calculated.

probability_of_birth.description: The probability of being born on the specific date, February 28.
